purpose: Immutable local baseline; modify only through an explicit upstream-sync change.
notes: The source worktree had unrelated uncommitted ResearchOS integration files at copy time. Local compatibility patch: craftext/environment/world_presets.py replaces Python tracer conversions/branches in solid-block, intrinsic-dynamics and instant-recovery step behaviors with JAX primitives; regression test lives in craftext/tests/test_world_presets_jax.py. Licenses and attribution live with each component.
